TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cudu, title = Cudu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cudu} }

S.FORM: == cudu == Cudu gamil nii ge so wahil qtaun ka bubu na, ado mdakil ma smgamil dheran ka bubu na, kii kesun miyan "cudu gamil" ka yami Seediq. Ini mahi seediq ka beyuq cudu gamil nii mesa rudan, niqan gcahu mesa. smcudu qcurux Smcudu nii we ririh so qqerac aangal nami qcurux yami Seediq. Smcudu de tmaqun tmuting btunux ka bubu cudu gamil nii hayan ma, sqada so bobo qsiya ruru ma qsiya yayung tikuh hari, sqada hii ka cudu gamil tntingan nii de, asi ptbhege ka qsiya ma mrtaso nanaq so kiya hari dungal,Ini qbsiyaq de meyah sbbuli kddamac bobo qsiya baro ka qcurux denu,kika roosun miyan mangal ciida ka qcurux. Meniq ka pntbhege qsiya kii we beyuq cudu gamil nii, beyuq na nii ka ptkuni ma pkdamac qcurux,kika meyah sbbuli bobo qsiya baro ka qcurux. aangal miyan qcurux Yami kesun Seediq nii ge, uxe nami seediq mptqcurux ka yami, seediq miyan pqlmiqu ka yami,ani so kiya we niqan ka ddooyan nami qmerac qcurux ma bolung duri. Klaali we liihun nami ka ruru ma yayung tikuh hari de,qrapan miyan ka qcurux, bolung ma karang denu; kmobu miyan ma kmadi nami qcurux bolung duri, kiya duri we plaling miyan qcurux. Pteumal pptasun Tado Walis,Pawan Nawi,Siyac Nabu,Pering Tado ma Ukan Siyac ka smneeru Dakis Pawan ka smnnetur
S.PHON: == ¶udu == ¶udu gamil nii g…ô so wańßil qtaun ka bubu na, ado mdakil ma smgamil dńß…ô…ĺan ka bubu na, kii k…ôsun mijan " ¶udu gamil" ka jami s…ô…ôdiq. ini mańßi s…ô…ôdiq ka b…ôuq ¶udu gamil nii m…ôsa …ĺudan, niqan g ¶ańßu m…ôsa. sm ¶udu q ¶u…ĺux sm ¶udu nii w…ô …ĺi…ĺińß so qq…ô…ĺa ¶ aaŇčal nami q ¶u…ĺux jami s…ô…ôdiq. sm ¶udu d…ô tmaqun tmutiŇč btunux ka bubu ¶udu gamil nii ńßajan ma, sqada so bobo qsija …ĺu…ĺu ma qsija jajuŇč tikuńß ńßa…ĺi, sqada ńßii ka ¶udu gamil tntiŇčan nii d…ô, asi ptbńß…ôg…ô ka qsija ma m…ĺtaso nanaq so kija ńßa…ĺi duŇčal,ini qbsijaq d…ô m…ôańß sbbuli kddama ¶ bobo qsija ba…ĺo ka q ¶u…ĺux d…ônu,kika …ĺoosun mijan maŇčal ¶iida ka q ¶u…ĺux. m…ôniq ka pntbńß…ôg…ô qsija kii w…ô b…ôuq ¶udu gamil nii, b…ôuq na nii ka ptkuni ma pkdama ¶ q ¶u…ĺux,kika m…ôańß sbbuli bobo qsija ba…ĺo ka q ¶u…ĺux. aaŇčal mijan q ¶u…ĺux jami k…ôsun s…ô…ôdiq nii g…ô, ux…ô nami s…ô…ôdiq mptq ¶u…ĺux ka jami, s…ô…ôdiq mijan pqlmiqu ka jami,ani so kija w…ô niqan ka ddoojan nami qm…ô…ĺa ¶ q ¶u…ĺux ma boluŇč du…ĺi. klaali w…ô liińßun nami ka …ĺu…ĺu ma jajuŇč tikuńß ńßa…ĺi d…ô,q…ĺapan mijan ka q ¶u…ĺux, boluŇč ma ka…ĺaŇč d…ônu; kmobu mijan ma kmadi nami q ¶u…ĺux boluŇč du…ĺi, kija du…ĺi w…ô plaliŇč mijan q ¶u…ĺux. pt…ôumal pptasun tado walis,pawan nawi,sija ¶ nabu,p…ô…ĺiŇč tado ma ukan sija ¶ ka smn…ô…ô…ĺu dakis pawan ka smnn…ôtu…ĺ
S.FORM: == cudu == Cudu gamil nii ge so wahil qtaun ka bubu na, ado mdakil ma smgamil dheran ka bubu na, kii kesun miyan "cudu gamil" ka yami Seediq. Ini mahi seediq ka beyuq cudu gamil nii mesa rudan, niqan gcahu mesa. smcudu qcurux Smcudu nii we ririh so qqerac aangal nami qcurux yami Seediq. Smcudu de tmaqun tmuting btunux ka bubu cudu gamil nii hayan ma, sqada so bobo qsiya ruru ma qsiya yayung tikuh hari, sqada hii ka cudu gamil tntingan nii de, asi ptbhege ka qsiya ma mrtaso nanaq so kiya hari dungal,Ini qbsiyaq de meyah sbbuli kddamac bobo qsiya baro ka qcurux denu,kika roosun miyan mangal ciida ka qcurux. Meniq ka pntbhege qsiya kii we beyuq cudu gamil nii, beyuq na nii ka ptkuni ma pkdamac qcurux,kika meyah sbbuli bobo qsiya baro ka qcurux. aangal miyan qcurux Yami kesun Seediq nii ge, uxe nami seediq mptqcurux ka yami, seediq miyan pqlmiqu ka yami,ani so kiya we niqan ka ddooyan nami qmerac qcurux ma bolung duri. Klaali we liihun nami ka ruru ma yayung tikuh hari de,qrapan miyan ka qcurux, bolung ma karang denu; kmobu miyan ma kmadi nami qcurux bolung duri, kiya duri we plaling miyan qcurux. Pteumal pptasun Tado Walis,Pawan Nawi,Siyac Nabu,Pering Tado ma Ukan Siyac ka smneeru Dakis Pawan ka smnnetur
S.PHON: == ¶udu == ¶udu gamil nii g…ô so wańßil qtaun ka bubu na, ado mdakil ma smgamil dńß…ô…ĺan ka bubu na, kii k…ôsun mijan " ¶udu gamil" ka jami s…ô…ôdiq. ini mańßi s…ô…ôdiq ka b…ôuq ¶udu gamil nii m…ôsa …ĺudan, niqan g ¶ańßu m…ôsa. sm ¶udu q ¶u…ĺux sm ¶udu nii w…ô …ĺi…ĺińß so qq…ô…ĺa ¶ aaŇčal nami q ¶u…ĺux jami s…ô…ôdiq. sm ¶udu d…ô tmaqun tmutiŇč btunux ka bubu ¶udu gamil nii ńßajan ma, sqada so bobo qsija …ĺu…ĺu ma qsija jajuŇč tikuńß ńßa…ĺi, sqada ńßii ka ¶udu gamil tntiŇčan nii d…ô, asi ptbńß…ôg…ô ka qsija ma m…ĺtaso nanaq so kija ńßa…ĺi duŇčal,ini qbsijaq d…ô m…ôańß sbbuli kddama ¶ bobo qsija ba…ĺo ka q ¶u…ĺux d…ônu,kika …ĺoosun mijan maŇčal ¶iida ka q ¶u…ĺux. m…ôniq ka pntbńß…ôg…ô qsija kii w…ô b…ôuq ¶udu gamil nii, b…ôuq na nii ka ptkuni ma pkdama ¶ q ¶u…ĺux,kika m…ôańß sbbuli bobo qsija ba…ĺo ka q ¶u…ĺux. aaŇčal mijan q ¶u…ĺux jami k…ôsun s…ô…ôdiq nii g…ô, ux…ô nami s…ô…ôdiq mptq ¶u…ĺux ka jami, s…ô…ôdiq mijan pqlmiqu ka jami,ani so kija w…ô niqan ka ddoojan nami qm…ô…ĺa ¶ q ¶u…ĺux ma boluŇč du…ĺi. klaali w…ô liińßun nami ka …ĺu…ĺu ma jajuŇč tikuńß ńßa…ĺi d…ô,q…ĺapan mijan ka q ¶u…ĺux, boluŇč ma ka…ĺaŇč d…ônu; kmobu mijan ma kmadi nami q ¶u…ĺux boluŇč du…ĺi, kija du…ĺi w…ô plaliŇč mijan q ¶u…ĺux. pt…ôumal pptasun tado walis,pawan nawi,sija ¶ nabu,p…ô…ĺiŇč tado ma ukan sija ¶ ka smn…ô…ô…ĺu dakis pawan ka smnn…ôtu…ĺ
